payload.label: picture frame
payload.long_description: Partial vertical picture frame with a narrow beige outer molding visible at the left edge of the crop, cut off by the image border; interior appears dark and glossy (glass or dark mat) with faint reflections, photographed from approximately 1.0 m away.
